<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava (`L`), so moving forward would be unsafe. The safe path starts by going downward through column B, so I should turn right to face down.

TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
